nodes.label: Active focus session — Whisper AI coach prompt + session controls
nodes.description: Home screen in SESIÓN ACTIVA state (green 'SESIÓN ACTIVA' badge top-left). Header: 'Estás en la zona.' with subtitle 'El ruido está fuera. Tu mente, dentro.' Two icon buttons top-right (settings and notification). Main card (dark rounded panel): 'Tu coach' section showing AI coach bubble: 'Tu sesión acaba de empezar. ¿Quiero ayudarte a organizarlos para aprovechar bien el tiempo?' with CTA link 'Ayúdame a organizarlo ›'. Below the bubble: '60 min · 13 min de claridad'. Red 'Finalizar sesión' button at bottom of card. Below main card: 'Sin apps protegidas' row with 'Activar' button (teal). Then 'Tu ritual de hoy' section (0 de 0 completadas) with edit icon and '+ Agregar al ritual de hoy' CTA. 'Recordatorios' section (3 activos) visible below. Screenshot name 'active-whisper-test' implies this is a test of the Whisper AI coach feature during active sessions.
nodes.ui_screen: Home — active focus session with Whisper AI coach

nodes.label: Whisper AI coach — conversational bubble UI during active session
nodes.description: The Whisper AI coach renders as a chat-style bubble inside the session card. It proactively asks the user if they want help organizing their time. The bubble uses a distinct 'Tu coach' label, a message body, and an action link ('Ayúdame a organizarlo ›'). Session metadata shown: 60 min total, 13 min de claridad. This suggests Whisper tracks clarity/focus quality in real time.
